_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis and RT–qPCR of MMP9 showed no significant effect on the expression level of protein and mRNA, respectively.
details: Western blot analysis showed no significant effect on MMP9 protein expression level in miR-29c transfected cells
